subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The written page was noted, and the written leaf was perused—the melody of the dawn-bird [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان ورق مسطور منظور گردید و رق منشور مطالعه شد نغمه مرغ سحرگاهی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @growth of the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant
